flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Alma College fell 14% between 2006 and 2009 (57.7% → 49.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Alma College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($43.9k → $49.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Alma College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($43.9k → $49.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Alma College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3k → 1.1k).
